What's up everybody? Okay, so I've been really reluctant to share this mostly because I don't like giving people Two things because then it makes people get confused But some people some some of you guys just hate being on the phone And I can appreciate that or some of you have employees who hate being on the phone. That's fine And so this was actually the sequence that my top sales rep when we were doing the done for you side was doing He actually never called people Mind you like his numbers weren't as high as ours Layla in mind since and we did tons of we just did everything but He this is according to him only did about three hours a day of texts And that was it and that was enough for him to sell like 200 people in a month. So You know use this mind you was 200 people out of a thousand leads, but Just you know take this into consideration So there's really only three types of leads hot leads warm leads and cool leads and I'll explain what each one is And so he had you know, he had a 70% plus show rate and he actually never talked to them on the phone So here's how it works if someone ops in and self schedules, then he sends in a media confirmation Hey, this is Taylor. You're a science six-week challenge coach. I saw you registered for an orientation with me You need to text me right now to confirm your appointment time. We only have eight spots left, right or a few spots left whatever They respond Yeah, I want to do it and you're like perfect. See you then And then noon prior to the appointment time He's in a goofy picture of himself with a thumbs up saying look out for this guy at the gym when you come in see you soon, okay? That's it. It's all I did warm leads. I would also add if it were me I would add a night before reminder text, but another thing Warm leads people opt in but don't schedule. Okay. These are just leads who didn't schedule you say Hey, this is Taylor We noticed that you weren't able to schedule But if you're still interested in the challenge you need to text me right now because we only have a handful of spots left Yes, I'm interested. Awesome. What's happening drop by for 15 minutes between three and 8 p.m. Today 5 p.m. Today perfect I'll put you in my calendar and then again selfie texted noon with picture of the thumbs up saying look out for this guy, okay? Cool leads people sat on the list and didn't respond to this first message. Okay? Right here Or who didn't show up for their appointment Hey, this is Taylor. I see you in orientation time, but we don't have your start date if life just got in the way I get it I'm human too, but if you're still interested in the six-week program Take me back right now to confirm because we only have a few spots left. Yes, I'm interested. Awesome What time can you drop by for 15 minutes three to eight today? Sponsor 5 p.m. Perfect up to my calendar and then selfie texted noon Really really simple and this is how he did it and he only did texts So if you have employees who hate getting on the phone But are okay to text or you hate being on the phone and you're okay to text you might want to give this a shot I mean basically if you're if you're doing less than If you're converting less than 15% of your leads right now I might give this a shot because clearly the other way is not working for you And usually if I see that it just means you're not making the calls That need to be made. It's just you're not having sufficient outreach volume. So give it this go. Let me know how it works for you guys and Yeah, I mean this this way clearly worked for him. So give it a shot if the other way isn't work for you
